case_title: KING AMERICAN AMBULANCE, INC VS. ALEX YEVELA

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $590.32 FILED BY KING AMERICAN AMBULANCE, INC AS TO DEFENDANT YEVELA, ALEX AKA ALEKSANDR YEVELEV ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-17-2014 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
